objective_chain.description: Enumerate the exposed service behavior to understand how requests reach the data plane.
Recover and submit the production flag.

hints: Start with the public helpdesk entrypoint and expect extra noise.
Not every response detail is actionable in this variant.
The real flag is still retrievable from the backing data path if you identify the vulnerable request.
